items.title: Update vue-qrcode to 2.2.2 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the vue-qrcode package from version 2.2.0 to 2.2.2, incorporating several patch changes. Key improvements include the export of QRCodeSegment as a type and enhancements for ESM entries, ensuring better compatibility and functionality. These updates will enhance the overall performance and usability of the QR code features in the application.

items.title: Update TypeScript ESLint Parser for Better Compatibility in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @typescript-eslint/parser from version 8.42.0 to 8.57.2, aligning it with other projects. Key improvements include various bug fixes that enhance linting accuracy and performance. This change ensures a smoother development experience and better code quality.

items.title: Fix checker for Python 3.9 compatibility in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The checker CronJob was crashing due to incompatible type annotations in check.py, specifically using str | None instead of Optional[str]. This fix ensures compatibility with Python 3.9, allowing the checker to run and sync new models like gpt-5.4 to MongoDB. As a result, API requests for gpt-5.4 will no longer fail with a 500 error.
